lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (documented in LEARNINGS.md), 0 errors, 0 new warnings

notes: Added 'Assigned Tools' section below 'Assigned Roles' section using identical DropdownMenu + badge pattern. fetchStepToolsByStep(step.id) loads assigned tools; fetchTools(workspaceId) populates dropdown (excludes already-assigned via assignedToolIds Set). Tool badges show name and cost_per_month if set, with X remove button. createStepTool/deleteStepTool handlers update local state. Cost section refactored to show labor cost and tool cost as separate line items with a total row. Cost block now renders when only tool costs exist (no time/frequency required). Wrench icon from lucide-react; Tool type from database.ts; StepToolWithTool from client.ts.
